entry.title: November 2025 Photo Gallery
entry.content: Photos from November 2025.

entry.title: Photo Gallery
entry.summary: A curated collection of my favorite photographs
entry.content:
Welcome to my photo gallery! This is a curated collection of moments captured through my lens, showcasing the beauty found in everyday life.

Featured Collection: Moments & Memories

The gallery below features a carefully selected arrangement of my favorite photographs. Each image represents a unique story - from quiet landscapes to candid moments, from natural wonders to urban scenes. The masonry-style layout creates visual harmony while allowing each photo to shine in its own space.

Interactive Features: - Click any photo to view it in a beautiful lightbox - Responsive design adapts perfectly to your screen size - Dynamic layout creates an engaging visual experience - Hover effects reveal the subtle details in each image

Showing {{ article.total_photos }} selected photographs from my collection. Click on any image to explore the full beauty and detail.
